name: Maidronii
description: Ouro Kronii (オーロ・クロニー) is a female English speaking Virtual YouTuber associated with hololive. She debuted in 2021 as part of hololive English -Council-, the second generation of members of hololive English, alongside Tsukumo Sana, Ceres Fauna, Nanashi Mumei and Hakos Baelz.
creator: Mikepagego
